channel.title: Deep Learning on AI Handbook
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Learning on AI Handbook

item.title: Activation
item.description: Activation functions # Binary-like # Sigmoid # \[ \sigma(x)=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}} \] Function: add non-linearity to linear outputs s.t. \(\sigma(z)\in(0,1)\) and \(\sigma(0)=0.5\) . Pros: imitation of the firing rate of a neuron, 0 if too negative and 1 if too positive. smooth gradient Cons: vanishing gradient: gradients rapidly shrink to 0 along backprop as long as any input is too positive or too negative.
